2269090.name: Furniture Toss
2269090.description:
Set up this cool space by launching furniture in wild and creative ways! Earn style points with epic bank shots, jaw-dropping combo throws, blazing fast tosses, long-distance launches, and more. Craving an adrenaline rush? Take on speed run mode and race to complete your setup in record time.

Get the art pieces in the right places with a painting-shooting gun. But beware—drones are on the loose, swooping in with furniture pieces and turning your setup into a thrilling test of strategy and reflexes! Climb the leader boards by setting the fastest time or racking up the most dazzling style score.

Here’s the kicker: it’s also a memory game! Hunt down hidden furniture scattered throughout the house. Can you conquer the chaos, unlock your creativity, and put it all back together?
2269090.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
